Ge egaoarser 2 SEAS QTG e S8 WL gl B G LT 38 5 G L R Y T RSN 2 © 52 And do not kill the soul [i.e., person] which Allah has forbidden, except by right.' And whoever is killed unjustly - We have given his heir authority, * but let him not exceed limits in [the matter of] taking life. Indeed, he has been supported [by the law].
